resources.string: A new version of Liftr is on Google Play.
Remove every exercise and start with a single empty block?
This removes every station from the Hyrox exercises list. You can add stations again before saving.
Sign in to log a workout
Sign in or create an account from the Profile tab to record and publish workouts.
Supabase is not configured. Add supabase.url and supabase.anonKey to local.properties and rebuild.
Sign in to continue tracking your workouts.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
Username must be at least 3 characters.
Create your account to start tracking your workouts.
You can change these later in your profile.
You can update these details later in your profile.
Account created. If email confirmation is required, check your inbox before signing in.
Enter the email for your account and we will send you a link to reset your password.
If an account exists for this email, you will receive a reset link shortly. Open it on this device.
Choose a new password for your account.
Room left in today\'s energy budget
Log meals to see your calorie balance.
Analyze nutrition and workouts over a custom date range.
Review how your logged meals and published workouts align over time. Pick a window (up to 10 weeks), then run the analysis.
Includes your BMR (metabolism) plus workout burn.
No custom ingredients yet. Tap New ingredient to create one.
No favorite ingredients yet. Tap the star on any item to save it here.
No custom recipes yet. Tap New recipe to create one.
No favorite recipes yet. Tap the star on any recipe to save it here.
Browse ingredients below or type to search.
You have no custom recipes yet.
Could not read label clearly. Please adjust lighting or input manually.
Add multiple ingredients: search, set grams, tap Add to recipe, then repeat.
Step 2 base is ready. This tab now exists and is connected to the main navigation shell.
Short races with limited winner slots; they reset each week. Different from achievements (permanent badges) and weekly goals (personal only).
Time-boxed races with limited winner slots. Weekly, monthly, and special one-off challenges. Separate from achievements and personal weekly goals.
Could not use this image. Try another file.
No personal records for this filter yet.
You have reached the XP for the next level; it will show after the next recalculation.
You are at the top configured level, or thresholds are not available for the next tier.
No further level thresholds are configured ahead of your current level.
Stats will appear when XP events can be loaded.
Based on your last %1$d XP events (up to %2$d loaded).
XP tied to a workout id that is not in your workouts anymore (often after a delete).
No timestamp on file for this profile.
Couldn\'t load XP events (table or permissions may differ).
Logging workouts and other eligible activity records XP events on the server.
Your level is derived from your total XP using the level_thresholds table.
After longer breaks, newly awarded points may be reduced (soft decay), so consistency matters.
Tell us what is going on and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
Describe the issue or request in as much detail as possible…
We will use your account email to contact you if we need more details.
We could not detect your account email. Please sign out and sign in again.
Could not send your message. Please try again.
See what is planned and vote on ideas.
Log in to submit requests or vote.
Current streak: %1$d week(s) with a completed goal
List shows your latest 100 goals; streak and by-metric use this sample. Totals use full history from the server.
No goals yet. Add your first one.
Recommendation reflects your recent activity (about the last 8 weeks). If you\'re new, we use a typical average.
You already have a %1$s goal for this week.
Live progress will show here when available. Pull down on the list to refresh.
About %1$.1f%% of Liftr users with at least one published workout have this achievement.
One session can count toward several muscles; workout totals may add up to more than your strength sessions.
Each period needs a start date before the end date.
Average of A’s % share across workouts, time, calories & score (50 ≈ even). Bars use a 0–100 scale.
All types in one place; the chart above shows workout mix as %.
% of each period’s workouts by type (side by side).
The strip splits the combined A+B total for each row (not a winner/loser score).
This week vs aligned last week
Periods have different lengths — totals aren’t directly comparable. Use “per day” or pick matching ranges.
Values are divided by the number of days in each period.
No logged workouts in period A for this filter.
No logged workouts in period B for this filter.
No logged workouts in either period for this filter.
Only workouts saved in Liftr in these date ranges. This isn’t a full “who’s fitter” comparison.
Your totals use Period A dates; the other person uses Period B. Quick ranges set the same window on both sides so the comparison is fair.
No workouts in this competition yet.
Allowed: time limit only, performance goal only, or both. Not allowed: both toggles off.
You already have a competition with this user
You can’t start a second competition with the same user while one is active.
There is already a pending invitation with this user.
Want another competition? Challenge someone else 👀
We couldn\'t find PRs with the same metric for you and @%1$s. Keep training and come back later!
Control which notifications are sent to your phone. Notifications can still appear inside the app.
Follow people to see their workouts here, or log your own.
No activity from people you follow yet. Log a workout to get started.
Sign in or create an account to view other people\'s workouts.
Create a plan and jump into Active Workout.
Sign in or create an account to start a workout.
Creating your workout and opening Active Workout.
Health Connect exposes exercise sessions from other apps. Choose a session to build a cardio workout in Liftr with the same start time and duration.

Only exercise sessions that Health Connect can read appear here (usually the last 7 days). Pick one to create a cardio workout in Liftr with the same start time and duration. If a session is missing, check that the source app writes to Health Connect and that you granted read permission.

• Install Health Connect from Play (Android 9+; on some devices it is pre-installed).
• Open “Allow reading exercise sessions” and accept the permission dialog.
• Sessions shown are those Health Connect returns for the last 7 days; your watch or training app must sync exercise data into Health Connect.
• Tapping a row creates a cardio workout in Liftr with the same start instant and duration (see confirmation dialog).
• If a session never appears, open Health Connect → Data and access → check that the source app is allowed to write and that Liftr can read Exercise sessions.
• Liftr only reads exercise sessions from Health Connect; grant read permission and ensure your watch or training app writes sessions there.
Health Connect is not installed. Install it from Play to read exercise sessions on this device.
Workout created (id %1$d). It will appear in the home feed after sync.
Start: %1$s · duration: %2$d s (tap Import to create in Liftr)
Streak %1$d days · This week: %2$d workouts · %3$d pts · %4$d kcal
Best week (MTD): %1$d pts · %2$d kcal · Best sport: %3$s (%4$d pts)
No Hyrox stations were found for this session. Finish will still save your session time.
Loading product from Play… try again in a moment.
No active subscription offer. Check the Play Console.
One subscription hides banner ads. Manage or cancel in Google Play.
No active subscription found. If you just subscribed, wait a moment and try again.
This will permanently delete your account and data. This action cannot be undone.
We removed your app data, but couldn\'t remove the Auth user. Contact support.
No entries in this range yet.
Enter a positive weight in kg.
Reads body-weight samples from Health Connect. Liftr does not write weight back to Health Connect.
You have not created any segments yet.
This user has not created any segments yet.
Select a day to see your workouts
Ongoing workout or shortcut to open Liftr
You can start alone on this device, or create a linked copy for %1$s so you both log the same plan.
No other participant is on this workout. Start alone.
Linked workout created (#%1$d). Your partner can open it on their account.
Tap to select people. Dual: exactly one selected. Group: pick two (you plus two partners on this phone, three people total).
Train together on this phone. Each person keeps their own weight, reps, and rest timers.
Start saved locally — will sync when online
Workout saved on device — will sync when online
Couldn\'t build a copy of this workout. Check your connection and try again.
Nothing to compare for these workouts. Please add more data to your workout
No metrics to compare (all values are zero for both workouts).
Based on %1$d of %2$d metrics (rest need non-zero right value for %%)
This can\'t be undone. Only your copy is removed.
This workout has no sport session to record.
This workout has no cardio session to record.
Map: set maps.apiKey in local.properties (Google Maps SDK).
If the street map stays blank, enable Maps SDK for Android on this Google Cloud key in project settleit-569dd, turn on billing, and allow app package com.lilru.liftr with your debug or release SHA-1.
Debug: %1$d cells in view · map loaded %2$s · key ends %3$s
In Android Studio Logcat, filter by LiftrTerritoryMap or Authorization failure, then open the Map tab again.
Times are estimates along the route until per-point timestamps are available for matching.
Tap the route on the map to snap start/end to the nearest point (length-based fractions).
This removes the segment and its leaderboard. You can only delete if no other user has matched efforts on it.
Other users have efforts on this segment—you can rename it but not delete it.
When you publish a cardio workout, routes that pass through existing published segments are matched automatically—you do not need to create the same segment again.
Scroll to move between exercises and sets. Use the buttons to log each set and rest when needed.
This workout has no strength sets to follow yet.
Add an exercise and configure its sets to continue this workout.
This workout lane is not available.
All sets completed. You can finish the workout.
Great job! Move on when ready.
Be the first to like this workout.
Type at least 2 characters to search.
Started at (ISO-8601, optional if empty = now)
Log a completed or in-progress session (normal upload).
Save a planned session to start later (state planned; shows in “My planned” on Home).
Tip: choose Plan to save this workout for later.
When you open the planned workout, you can start it as an Active Workout.
No exercises yet. Tap to add lifts.
You are not following anyone to add yet.
Linked personal workouts for your guests (dual) are created when you open this and tap Start — not when you save from here.
How to start a live workout
How to start a live workout

You can start a planned workout in live mode for Strength, Cardio, and Sport:

• Strength — exercise-by-exercise flow with rest timers, sets, and reps.
• Cardio — session timer, distance, and optional GPS tracking for supported activities.
• Sport — session timer plus sport-specific details (for example scores or structured blocks such as Hyrox).

Steps (all types):

1) Create the workout as a Plan (Mode: Plan)
2) Save it
3) Open the planned workout from your workouts list
4) Tap Start

Tip: If you just want to log what you did after training, choose Mode: Add.

For planned Strength workouts you can train with someone else on one device:

• Dual — you and one guest; each person has their own lane while you follow the same session.
• Group — you and up to two guests (three people in total), each with their own lane.

Before you start, you can choose who joins from the participants on the workout. Liftr creates linked copies so everyone's work is saved to their own workout.

The host can be any participant, not only the person who created the workout — open the planned workout on your phone and tap Start when you're leading the session.

Finish ends the linked session for everyone when you confirm.
• To show calories, the workout must have BOTH a start time and an end time.\n• Calories are estimated and may not be 100% accurate.
Routines use the program of the person selected in the lane above.
Use the arrows to reorder (when you have 2+ exercises).
No saved routines yet. Save one when you publish a strength workout.
Routines in this folder may be moved or deleted. This cannot be undone.
No exercises yet. Add one from the list below.
Tap an exercise to add it
Uses your last 10 logged workouts of this type. Pick a data source, then Generate.

Uses your last 10 logged workouts of this type. Strength: weights from your latest sets with RPE (±2.5 kg). When RPE was easy we may add a set or a few reps if volume isn’t already high; when it was very hard we may trim reps or a set—otherwise we lean on weight changes.
Uses your last 10 logged workouts of this type and suggests activity plus duration based on your recent trend.

Uses your last 10 logged workouts of this type and suggests a realistic next session duration. For sport: Hyrox — mixed varies stations from your logs; Hyrox — race format follows competition order and standard distances. Otherwise we suggest session length and sport from your history or the catalog.
No conversations yet. Start a new chat with the + button.
Drag the messages button to any side of the screen.
No conversations yet. Start a new chat with the + button.
No conversations yet. Start a new chat with the + button.
